name: [HIGH] CVE-2026-26960
statusMessage: tar: node-tar: node-tar: Arbitrary file read/write via malicious archive hardlink creation
statusTrace: node-tar is a full-featured Tar for Node.js. When using default options in versions 7.5.7 and below, an attacker-controlled archive can create a hardlink inside the extraction directory that points to a file outside the extraction root, enabling arbitrary file read and write as the extracting user. Severity is high because the primitive bypasses path protections and turns archive extraction into a direct filesystem access primitive. This issue has been fixed in version 7.5.8.

items.statusDetails: tar: node-tar: node-tar: Arbitrary file read/write via malicious archive hardlink creation
